title: Head-Term Avoidance List
rule: These terms remain as money pages but are NOT the main 6-month traffic plan. QFINHUB cannot win these yet.

mortgage_calculator.competition: Bankrate, NerdWallet, Zillow, Calculator.net — all DR 70-90
mortgage_calculator.note: Essential page to have, but zero chance of meaningful traffic in 6 months

loan_calculator.note: Already getting impressions but competing against giants

retirement_calculator.note: Financial institutions dominate — can't beat them

investment_calculator.note: Getting impressions but ranking deep. Not primary target.

what_to_attack_instead: Long-tail salary + location queries: '100k salary after tax Texas'
Specific loan amount queries: '20000 loan at 8 percent monthly payment'
Mortgage affordability by salary: 'can I afford 400k house on 80k'
Retirement by age/savings: 'retire at 45 with 1 million'
Compound interest with specific numbers: 'invest 500 month for 20 years'
Debt payoff specific amounts: 'pay off 10000 credit card debt snowball'
money_page_strategy: Keep head-term money pages as hub/authority pages. They link to long-tail database pages. They may eventually rank if domain authority grows, but they are NOT the traffic plan for months 1-6.
